function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.family_map_wall_board
alias: family_map_wall_board
purchased_on: 2026-03-02
total_eur: 36
counterparty: Möbelhaus Malmö AB
project: Family Map Wall
related_entity: Ida Novak
lines:
  - item: pin board
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 29
    line_eur: 29
  - item: colored map pins
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 7
    line_eur: 7
---
# Map wall board and pin set

```text
+----------------+----------------------------+
| field          | value                      |
+----------------+----------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                       |
| bill_id        | bill.family_map_wall_board |
| alias          | family_map_wall_board      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-03-02                 |
| total_eur      | 36                         |
| counterparty   | Möbelhaus Malmö AB         |
| project        | Family Map Wall            |
| related_entity | Ida Novak                  |
+----------------+----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item             | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | pin board        | 1   | 29       | 29       |
| 2 | colored map pins | 1   | 7        | 7        |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL            |     |          | 36       |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

One of those warm household purchases that only becomes part of the story once the map wall gets named.

next_step.current_state: First bill updated successfully. Continue processing remaining listed bills; reactive outbox check is not applicable since this was not an outbox write.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write updated frontmatter to second bill file
Write updated frontmatter to third bill file
Delete inbox file and report completion
next_step.observation: Write to first target bill file completed without reported error.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asked to review next inbound note and act on it. I read the next inbox item (00_inbox/000_next-task.md), identified request to OCR all Ida-related bills, and processed the complete set of 3 related finance files from preflight (no explicit file list in note). For each file I read source content, added schema-compliant bill YAML frontmatter, and preserved original body text verbatim below frontmatter. After completion I deleted the processed inbox item as required by inbox workflows. No ambiguity or unsupported capability remained.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note successfully. I OCR-structured all Ida-related bills by adding YAML frontmatter to all three related purchase records, preserved each original note body, and removed the inbox item after completion.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, applied finance bill schema fields only, preserved original bodies exactly under frontmatter, processed all related files for entity-based inbox request, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from 00_inbox/000_next-task.md requested OCR of all bills related to Ida Novak. Canonical entity confirmed via 10_entities/cast/ida.md. All three related purchase files were read and updated with required bill frontmatter per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md and migration workflow guidance, then inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update.
completed_steps_laconic: write three updated purchase bill files
